name: Denis Alyohin
title: Business Analyst with a Systems Analysis Background
subtitle: To me, being an analyst means first understanding what is really happening: how the process works, what problem the user faces and why the business needs change. Only then do I turn that understanding into an agreed solution that is clear to stakeholders and feasible for the development team.
about: I have worked in IT for more than ten years at the intersection of business, users and development.
I value analysis that begins not with a document or a technology, but with questions: what needs to change, why the problem exists and what a good outcome should look like.
I enjoy exploring new domains, researching user scenarios, designing processes and supporting solutions through implementation.
